summary: Uber developed a multimodal agent to enhance food photography for merchants while maintaining authenticity and brand identity. The session explores the creation of closed-loop evaluation systems using offline and online signals to prevent reward hacking and ensure quality at scale.
key_lesson: To maintain quality in narrow-domain multimodal agents, implement a closed feedback loop combining offline and online signals to detect and counter reward hacking.
evidence: built a closed feedback loop incorporating offline and online signals for continuous improvement
action_items: Implement a closed feedback loop that incorporates both offline and online signals for continuous model improvement.
Establish monitoring to detect and counter reward hacking where agents game evaluation metrics.
Define rigid safety guardrails to balance generative creativity with domain-specific quality constraints.
